description: Letter from Shelomo b. Yehuda, concerning a dispute, an excommunication of "this wicked man", greetings to the communcal leaders etc. According to Gil it dates to 1042 and the conflict with Natan b. Avraham. More broadly, an inferred date range of 1025–1051 CE is feasible based on the years when Shelomo b. Yehuda served as Gaʾon.
